author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered Phase 2: GRU forward restructured for fused GPU path.

Changes:
1. Weight transposes (wih_t, whh_t) hoisted outside timestep loop — was recomputed every timestep
2. GPU f32 fast path: calls fused_gru_cell_f32 with raw gate matrices + biases → one kernel per timestep instead of ~14 tensor ops
3. CPU fallback preserved unchanged for non-GPU/non-f32 params
4. Fixed ops::linalg::mm to contiguify non-contiguous inputs (needed for zero-copy transpose)

Architecture per timestep:
- Before: 2 mm + 2 broadcast + 2 add + 6 tensor splits + 3 sigmoid/tanh + 4 elementwise = ~19 ops
- After (GPU): 2 mm (cuBLAS) + 1 fused kernel = 3 launches

All 810 core + 808 nn + 25 GRU + 6 integration tests pass.

Backward kernel still pending — the forward produces workspace but backward currently uses autograd. A fused backward kernel would be the next optimization.
